Footer.description: Otolaryngology & Head and Neck Surgeon. Modern, evidence-based solutions for aesthetics and health.

Home.heroDesc: At the clinic led by Opr. Dr. Murat Ayata, we offer personalized surgical and medical treatment plans meeting your functional and aesthetic expectations in light of current medical literature.
Home.servicesDesc: Professional solutions offered for you to regain your health and aesthetic appearance.
Home.rhinoplastyDesc: Surgical interventions suitable for facial symmetry, preserving respiratory physiology and observing functional anatomy.
Home.medicalDesc: Clinical focused treatments such as botulinum toxin (botox), dermal filler, and mesotherapy applied with minimally invasive techniques.
Home.eyelidDesc: Operations aimed at eliminating structural deformations in the eye contour and facial region using microsurgery principles.
Home.aboutP1: With years of experience, I prioritize patient satisfaction in the treatment of Ear, Nose, and Throat diseases and facial aesthetic surgery.
Home.aboutP2: Every patient's facial anatomy and expectations are unique. That's why my basic philosophy in treatment is to achieve "natural-looking, breathing results tailored to you."

AboutMe.title: About Me
AboutMe.bio1: Born in 1984 in Trabzon. He completed his primary education at Akçaabat Central Primary School and Ardeşen Cumhuriyet Primary School, and his middle and high school education at Rize Pazar Ahmet Tahtakılıç Anatolian High School.
AboutMe.bio2: After completing his University Education at Ege University Faculty of Medicine, he completed his specialization training in Otorhinolaryngology at Ankara Training and Research Hospital.
AboutMe.bio3: He worked at Kırklareli State Hospital between 2014-2018, and at Kırklareli Private Doğuş Medical Center and Lüleburgaz Private Medikent Hospital between 2018-2023. Since 2023, he has been working in his private practice in Kırklareli.
AboutMe.bio4: He is married and the father of two daughters, Ada and Nil.

Medical.title: Medical Procedures
Medical.desc: Modern medical aesthetic methods that allow you to achieve a younger and more dynamic facial expression without the need for surgical intervention.

treatments.t1_desc: Elimination of mimic lines, masseter botox and sweating treatment.
treatments.t2_desc: Lip, cheek, under-eye light filler and jawline shaping.
treatments.t3_desc: Vitamin injections that increase skin quality, rejuvenate and prevent hair loss.
treatments.t4_desc: Lifting effect with thread lift, youth vaccine and microneedling radiofrequency applications.

Surgical.title: Surgical Procedures
Surgical.desc: Aesthetic operations performed with experience, evidence-based medicine, and modern surgical techniques.

surgeries.s1_desc: Aesthetic operation that corrects the external appearance of the nose while making breathing function ideal.
surgeries.s2_desc: Providing healthy breathing by correcting cartilage and bone curvatures inside the nose.
surgeries.s3_desc: The procedure of correcting deformities and angle differences in the auricle.
surgeries.s4_desc: Youthful looks by eliminating sagging or bagging in the lower and upper eyelids.
surgeries.s5_desc: Recovery of submental fat excess and skin sagging with surgical methods.

Contact.title: Contact & Appointment
Contact.desc: You can reach us through our contact details to get information about examinations and procedures, or to make an appointment.
Contact.addressDesc: Kirklareli Center, Turgutbey St. Op. Dr. Murat Ayata Clinic
Contact.onlineBookDesc: You can visit our Doktor Takvimi profile to create an online appointment schedule and read patient reviews.
